publishedAbstract:
* noobaa-operator pod is stuck in Initializing state when deploying OCS 4 in a proxy enabled environment. * noobaa-operator pod returns `status code: 403` error while creating the default noobaa backing store in a UPI VMware environment ~~~ time="2020-01-23T09:46:38Z" level=info msg="creating bucket noobaa-backing-store-ed24f6c7-579c-49da-a8ed-b07a299a6b8e" sys=openshift-storage/noobaa time="2020-01-23T09:23:36Z" level=error msg="got error when trying to create bucket noobaa-backing-store-62e0c28e-b598-413a-86e6-ee56bbf8141b. error: SerializationError: failed to unmarshal error message
	status code: 403, request id:, host id: 
caused by: Unmarshal Error: failed to unmarshal error message
	00000000 ~~~
publishedTitle: Noobaa-operator pod is stuck in init state when deploying OCS 4 in a proxy  environment.
